sentences.arabic: تَقْضِي سَارَةُ سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً أَمَامَ شَاشَةِ الْهَاتِفِ الْمَحْمُولِ.
sentences.translation: Sara provodi duge sate ispred ekrana mobilnog telefona.
sentences.translationEn: Sara spends long hours in front of the mobile phone screen.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ سَارَةُ تَقْلِيلَ وَقْتِ الشَّاشَةِ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى صِحَّتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Sara je odlučila smanjiti vrijeme provedeno ispred ekrana kako bi očuvala svoje zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Sara decided to reduce screen time to maintain her health.

sentences.arabic: الْآنَ هِيَ تَقْرَأُ الْكُتُبَ الْوَرَقِيَّةَ فِي وَقْتِ فَرَاغِهَا.
sentences.translation: Sada ona u slobodno vrijeme čita papirne knjige.
sentences.translationEn: Now she reads paper books in her spare time.
